title: Errata: L'oscuro scrutare di Philip K. Dick (Review)
author: Umberto Rossi
card_summary: A review/errata notice from Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 35, No. 1, March 2008) by Umberto Rossi regarding his Italian-language study of Dick, L'oscuro scrutare di Philip K. Dick (Philip K. Dick's Dark Scanning). Reflects the international dimension of Dick scholarship. 2 pages.
